security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' blob: data: ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://github.com https://*.githubusercontent.com; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; worker-src 'self' blob:; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Transparent locAl Medical Image AnalysiS Tool
bundle.longDescription: Browser-only PWA for running ONNX medical-imaging models on local DICOM/NIfTI/NRRD files, packaged as a desktop application. No upload, no server-side inference, all processing runs on the user's device GPU via WebGPU.
